reason: Billy Madison’s childish school hijinks are pure absurd fun from start to finish.
Dumb & Dumber’s endless pratfalls and clueless heroes deliver nonstop belly laughs.
Ace Ventura’s over-the-top animal antics keep the silliness rolling.
Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls doubles down on wacky pet detective chaos.
Happy Gilmore’s golf-bound pratfalls are gloriously goofy and ridiculous.
The Mask unleashes wild cartoon physics and Jim Carrey’s manic humor.
Bio-Dome’s environmental goofballs trapped in a bubble of ridiculousness.
Black Sheep’s goofy family feud is full of slapstick and silliness.
Kingpin mixes bowling and con artistry in delightfully dumb ways.
Bean’s bumbling bank teller is a zany marvel of physical comedy.
